summary: FieldFlow Pro System Updates v5.0 testing completed successfully. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All new features verified: Worker My Sales with worker_name/branch_name, CRE date filter, coupon range generation without hardcoded limits, Excel-style CRE dashboard with Quick Call tab.
critical_code_review_comments: All v5.0 system updates implemented correctly
Worker My Sales API returns worker_name, branch_name, campaign_name as expected
CRE date filter (from_date, to_date) working correctly with YYYY-MM-DD format
Coupon range generation has no hardcoded limits - tested with 500+ coupons
Worker sale flow simplified - OCR removed, only validates coupon exists and is available
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. Test campaigns 'Range Test 200' (RNG100-RNG299) and 'Final Test' (FIN500-FIN599) verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v5.0 System Updates fully tested. Key features: 1) Worker My Sales API at /api/campaigns/worker/my-sales returns worker_name, branch_name, campaign_name fields. 2) CRE customers API at /api/cre/customers supports from_date and to_date query params (YYYY-MM-DD format) and returns worker_name field. 3) Campaign coupon range generation has no hardcoded limits - campaigns can have 500+ coupons. 4) Worker sale flow simplified - no OCR processing, just validates coupon exists and is available. 5) CRE Dashboard has Excel-style table with sortable columns, Quick Call tab with search, date filters (Today/Yesterday/7D buttons), and CSV export.

features_tested.worker_my_sales_api: GET /api/campaigns/worker/my-sales - returns worker_name, branch_name, campaign_name fields
features_tested.cre_date_filter: GET /api/cre/customers?from_date=YYYY-MM-DD&to_date=YYYY-MM-DD - filters customers by sale date
features_tested.cre_worker_name_field: CRE customers response includes worker_name field
features_tested.coupon_range_generation: No hardcoded 50-coupon limit - tested with 200, 500, 700, 1000 coupons
features_tested.worker_sale_flow: Simplified validation - only checks coupon exists and is available, no OCR
features_tested.cre_dashboard_excel_table: Excel-style table with sortable columns: Date, Customer, Mobile, Coupon, Campaign, Branch, Worker, Status, Remarks, Call
features_tested.cre_dashboard_search: Search by name, phone, or coupon code
features_tested.cre_dashboard_quick_call_tab: Quick Call tab with search and contact list
features_tested.worker_my_sales_table: My Sales table shows Worker Name and Branch Name columns

mocked_apis.OTP_verification: POST /api/coupons/request-otp returns mock_otp in response for testing
